text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka and I are at the special summer training camp. It's held
every year to help students prepare for the races ahead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: There are only a few days left of camp...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This really is the perfect environment for me to focus on my training.
I'll be sad to bid it farewell.
choice_data_list: Let's enjoy these last days to their fullest.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that sounds good.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, by the way, Trainer. About the triathlon event...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The event that Silence Suzuka is referring to has become something
of a tradition at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The triathlon features swimming, biking, and long-distance foot races.
Participants need a good command over their stamina to win it.
choice_data_list:
Oh yeah, you haven't signed up for it, have
you?

Oh yeah, you haven't signed up for it, have
you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No... My specialty is with medium distances after all, and I don't think
I'd be able to keep up as a front runner for quite so long...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Would it be okay if I tried anyway?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It might help me enjoy this last part of camp to its fullest, like you
said.
choice_data_list: Sounds good to me. I'll be cheering you on!
Sounds good to me. I'll be cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, thank you! I'll be sure to give it my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After signing up for the event, the big day rolls around quickly.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There are quite a lot of participants. I wonder if this is part of the
training regimen for some...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it's much the same for me. I only intend to go at my own
pace from start to finish.
choice_data_list: Gonna try switching up your style?
Gonna try switching up your style?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, I'm a runaway through and through.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Can I ask you a favor?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Do you think... you could get me another reward?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Oh right, I heard that there was a festival happening tonight.
Do you think you could take me there?
choice_data_list: Sure. We'll hit up some food stalls.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Off I go, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So begins the first event of the triathlon.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll have our contestants battlin' the big blue! Seems like
smooth sailin' today, but swimmin' against these waves'll be tough!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Silence Suzuka with an early lead. Land or sea, she doesn't
give up the front spot!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Suzuka's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: But this is a triathlon, yeah? Shouldn't she be saving her stamina?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the concerns of some, Suzuka is easily able to pull away from
the competition in both the swimming and bike races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All that remains is the long-distance contest.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text: It all comes down to this! Silence Suzuka still has the lead!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text: But what's this? Signs of slowdown? The pack is closing in on her!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I wait near the finish, I can see Suzuka come dashing into view.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I don't think she has much left in the tank...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
She should be able to hear us from here, so let's bring her across the
finish! Go for it, Suzukaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The triathlon is simply part of our training regimen, so maybe I shouldn't take it too seriously—but I can't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure if she can hear my voice, but that's no reason to
skimp on the cheers.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This scenery... It's mine alone!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Silence Suzuka picks up speed once again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text: She's pulling away from the pack! Look at those legs go!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her lead unwavering, Suzuka crosses the finish line! The winner of this
year's summer camp triathlon is Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: WOOOOOOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That shaved ice was delicious! It was just the thing I needed after all
that exercise today.
choice_data_list: Was it more delicious than the taste of victory?
Was it more delicious than the taste of victory?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can't bring myself to give up the view from the lead in any race. But I
knew that wouldn't be easy in a triathlon—that's why I wasn't planning
to enter.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But then I realized that just like at the fan event before, all I had to
do was clear my mind and stop overthinking it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to your guidance and encouragement that I'm now able to
do that.
choice_data_list: So it was a good bit of training after all.
So it was a good bit of training after all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Very... And there's one more thing I realized as well.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Silent scenery filled only with the sounds of the wind and my own
beating heart... A world with no one but myself in it was the most
important thing to me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I think that has changed a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A world with no one else in it... except for you, waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Seeing you is all I need to muster up the strength to win.
choice_data_list: I'll always be waiting for you at the finish line.
I'll always be waiting for you at the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No matter the race, I'll always find my way to the front... back to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has clearly helped Silence Suzuka not only to grow
athletically, but also to more deeply experience her emotions.
